query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_tips FROM tips; SELECT t.songId, t.amountCents, t.status, t.createdAt FROM tips t ORDER BY t.createdAt DESC LIMIT 10; SELECT s.title, COUNT(t.id) as tip_count, SUM(t.amountCents) as total_cents FROM songs s LEFT JOIN tips t ON s.id = t.songId WHERE s.userId = 780095 GROUP BY s.id, s.title ORDER BY tip_count DESC LIMIT 10;
